title: Dough Tools and Cutters for Kids, 41Pcs Dough Accessories Molds, Shape, Scissors, Rolling Pin, Play Mat with Storage Bag, Arts and Crafts Kits Gift for Boys Girls
features: 【Dough Tools and Cutters】: 41Pcs dough tools kit include rolling pins, dinosaur molds, shapes, cutters extruder, mat and a great handbag etc. The variety is colorful and endlessly stimulates the imagination and creativity of children.

【Dough Tools Sets】: Every dough Accessories is made of high-quality plastic, a material that is very sturdy and durable. The clay dough tools are bright in color, perfectly sized for tiny hands. Molds Easily Into Any Shape. Cultivate children's hands-on ability. Learn and explore in games.

【Dough Tools Toys】: Dough mat made of high quality silicone,pretty durable. about 15.7" *11.8", suitable for 1-2 children. Just wipe and clean with a cloth and water when dirty. Perfect table protector. Easy to fold, convenient to store and carry on.

【Recyclable Package】: Beautifully designed handbag made of high quality PVC, recyclable package, perfect storage all clay dough tools, Solve the problem of confusion and loss. In addition, it is convenient to carry and go out.

【Share The Creativity】: Dough tool sets offer all kinds of open-ended play. Playsets come in many different themes and offer lots of creative role play, Share and create fun with all your friends, also great for parties and classrooms.
